info.title: Retrieve Maintenance Contracts API
info.description:
Retrieves **detailed maintenance contract information** for a specified **PIN** (product identification number) and **dealer**. The legacy SOAP **Retrieve Maintenance Contract details** operation maps to this REST API; see your **SOAP-to-REST field mapping** and **REST API FAQ** attachments for property-level details.

Support: Warranty_Api_Support@JohnDeere.com

servers.description: Sandbox (cert). Production uses `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` — confirm the path prefix under `/digcust/wy/` and whether the `cert` segment is present for your environment.

OAuth2.description: John Deere Dealer Solutions OAuth 2.0. Use the **authorization code** flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the **client credentials** grant for machine-to-machine access. Request the OAuth scope assigned to your application for this API (this reference uses `warranty` as an example — confirm the scope in your Developer.Deere.com application and technical documentation).

PinDealerContractSummary.description: Maintenance contract context for the **PinDealerSet** key. The exact properties depend on the OData contract and your SOAP-to-REST mapping; additional fields may appear.

pin.description: Product identification number used in the lookup key.

dealer.description: Dealer identifier used in the lookup key.

contractCount.description: Number of contracts when returned by the service.

MaintenanceContractDetail.description: A single maintenance contract line or header from the **Contracts** navigation. Field names follow your OData and SOAP-to-REST mapping.

coverageEndDate.description: Coverage end date when returned (format may vary by service).

ContractsCollection.description: OData collection payload for contract details under **PinDealerSet**.

value.description: Contract entities returned for the PIN and dealer.

message.example: No maintenance contracts were found for the supplied PIN and dealer.

get.summary: Get contract for PIN and dealer
get.description:
Retrieves maintenance contract information from **PinDealerSet** using the OData-style key: **Pin** and **Dealer**.

**Sandbox example:** `GET https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/WtyDbsMaintContract/PinDealerSet(Pin='1E012345678901234',Dealer='550012345')`

**Production:** Use the production host (`https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com`) with the path pattern documented for your program (the `cert` segment or application id may differ from sandbox).

**Accept:** `application/json`

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (sandbox example: `WtyDbsMaintContract`).

parameters.name: Pin
parameters.description: Product identification number (PIN) in the PinDealerSet key.

parameters.name: Dealer
parameters.description: Dealer identifier in the PinDealerSet key.

200.description: Maintenance contract context returned for the supplied PIN and dealer.

400.description: Bad request — malformed key or invalid parameters.

error.message: The PinDealerSet key could not be parsed.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.

404.description: No maintenance contract data found for the supplied PIN and dealer.

error.message: No maintenance contracts were found for the supplied PIN and dealer.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Get contract details for PIN and dealer
get.description:
Retrieves **contract detail** entities from the **Contracts** navigation property for the **PinDealerSet** key.

**Sandbox example:** `GET https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/WtyDbsMaintContract/PinDealerSet(Pin='1E012345678901234',Dealer='550012345')/Contracts`

**Production:** Use the production host (`https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com`) with the path pattern documented for your program.

**Accept:** `application/json`

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (sandbox example: `WtyDbsMaintContract`).

parameters.name: Pin
parameters.description: Product identification number (PIN) in the PinDealerSet key.

parameters.name: Dealer
parameters.description: Dealer identifier in the PinDealerSet key.

200.description: Contract details returned for the supplied PIN and dealer.

400.description: Bad request — malformed key or invalid parameters.

error.message: The PinDealerSet key could not be parsed.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.

404.description: No contract details found for the supplied PIN and dealer.

error.message: No contract details were found for the supplied PIN and dealer.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
